name: The Harsh Truth - Ms. Harshwhinny
description:
"Oh, well. Better late than never."


It was supposed to be a normal sneak-in. You slip into the Rainbow Falls arena out back, you try some of the stand foods, you walk out onto the field...y'know, tourism stuff. But unfortunately, a very exhausted and annoyed Ms. Harshwhinny has other plans. Deciding YOU'RE her new assistant, you have a new objective. A more hooves-on role in making sure to get the Equestria Games up and running! Hey, and if you do a good enough job, this position might come with some...great benefits.

One of my personal favorite ponies. Kinda glad I got to work on her. Everyone loves a manager mare.

Art Credits: Hasbro
creator: ComicalAngst
